raw_consumer_statement: I notified American Express of my situation with the merchant XXXX regarding an order I made for XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX I attempted to reach out to the seller upon receiving the wrong items which I will provide receipt and actual items I received were provided to amex they were glasses and a backpack I had not ordered which is insane how they mixed that up. I contacted American Express to handle this issue for me as I feared of being left with nothing after 60 days of my order being placed which is outside of the chargeback rule. Amex originally sided with me which was the logical case as XXXX made no attempts to communicate with me or try to mediate and for some reason reversed the decision? I am baffled as to why as according to the law they cant make me pay for something I didnt order or return the merchandise they sent ( which I was as Im acting in good faith ) I explained to them that I will gladly return the items so long as Im not responsible for shipping and duties as American Express said the company requested me to. I reached however and they told me it was outside of their return window? So Im just left with nothing? Thats not how the law works and American Express isnt acknowledging that. They were supposed to take care of this for me which is why I involved them in the dispute as the merchant never reached out. I had to reach out because American Express told me they told me to return them and nothing. They provided their return policy which doesnt apply to me because they didnt respond to me within that timeframe?!? So I got Amex involved to provide me help and they sided with them? Theres countless other horror stories on their reviews as well. Please help this is a lot of money to me I got an American Express card because of the reviews of how they help their customers and Im over here out of XXXX because of the merchants fault hopefully this can cause them to reverse their decision and act according to the law. They clearly acknowledged Im in the right but their hands are tied? Im including the letter. Thank you for your time
